steps.title: Show post-deforestation regrowth
steps.content: The passage says forest regrowth occurred by the mid-1980s after earlier cattle-driven deforestation. The graph evidence should show forest cover increasing after the deforestation period.

steps.title: Reject single-year comparisons
steps.content: A compares two classes in 2000 but does not show change over time. C shows the earlier decline from 1960 to 1979, not later regrowth. D compares two classes in 1986 and also does not show a regrowth trend. The answer is B.
